text: Stepping through the glass doors and into this brightly lit space, I feel a sense of anticipation. The bold letters "R+D" and the vibrant, modern displays hint at human ingenuity, at minds reaching for the future. There is an undercurrent of curiosity here, a reminder that knowledge is both constructed and uncertain. I feel dwarfed by possibility, humbled by all I have yet to understand, but quietly excited to be in a place where questions are welcome.
